title: Creamy Balsamic Mushroom Pasta with Ground Beef
time: Prep: 15 min | Cook: 30 min | Total: 45 min
bodyHtml:
Time: 45 mins
Style: One Pot (Mon Dinner + Tue Lunch)

Ingredients (Shared Batch: 4 portions)

  • 3 lbs Ground Beef (90/10)
  • 16 oz Oyster Mushrooms (sliced)
  • 1 bag (approx 5-6 oz) Fresh Spinach
  • 12 oz Gluten-Free/Cassava Pasta
  • 1/2 cup Balsamic Vinegar
  • 1/2 cup Full-fat Coconut Milk
  • Garlic-infused Olive Oil, Thyme, Sea Salt
  • Tapioca starch (for slurry)

Step-by-Step Instructions

Boil the 12 oz gluten-free pasta to al dente, strain, and set aside.
Brown the 3 lbs ground beef in a large pot with infused oil, salt, and thyme. Drain excess fat if needed.
Add the 16 oz oyster mushrooms and green onion tops; sauté 7-9 mins.
Stir in 1/2 cup balsamic vinegar, water, and 1/2 cup coconut milk. Simmer for 10 mins.
Fold in the entire bag of spinach to wilt, then add tapioca slurry to thicken the sauce.
Combine with cooked pasta and serve.

Portioning Guide (Cooked)

Alexander (2 meals): 10 oz cooked beef/sauce mix + 1.5 cups pasta per meal.

Hanna (2 meals): 6 oz cooked beef/sauce mix + 1 cup pasta per meal.
